message:
feat: wiring and cleanup (InputHistory, async error handling, EventBus cap, signal cleanup)

- Wire InputHistory into CLI for persistent command history
- Wrap handleEvent in catch to prevent unhandled rejections
- Add clearEvents() and 10k event cap to EventBus
- Fix abort signal listener leak by removing handler on normal completion
- Mark session.ts submitGoal as deprecated
- Wire /model and /status slash commands in CLI
- Add handleSigint tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
